name: Create Pool
description: 4-step wizard to deploy a new parametric insurance pool on Avalanche Fuji

screens.name: Create Pool Wizard
screens.description: 4-step wizard: Sources (select 2-3 data sources + consensus method), Trigger (metric, comparison, threshold, cadence), Agreements (eligibility + settlement text with AI generation), Deploy (premium/payout/duration/holders, deposit underwriting capital, deploy via SurelyFactory).

sections.title: Create Insurance Pool
sections.subtitle: Deploy a new parametric pool on Avalanche Fuji

steps.label: Sources
steps.description: Select data sources for trigger monitoring

fields.name: sources
fields.label: Data Sources
fields.helperText: Select 2-3 sources: CoinGecko, CryptoCompare, Chainlink, OpenWeather, FlightAware, custom HTTP

fields.name: consensusMethod
fields.label: Consensus Method
fields.helperText: How to resolve disagreements across sources

fields.name: threshold
fields.label: Threshold
fields.placeholder: e.g. 50000 for BTC price in USD

steps.label: Agreements
steps.description: Write eligibility and settlement agreement text

fields.name: verificationType
fields.label: Verification Type
fields.helperText: What policyholders must prove to purchase

fields.name: eligibilityAgreement
fields.label: Eligibility Agreement
fields.placeholder: Describe who is eligible to purchase this policy...

fields.name: settlementAgreement
fields.label: Settlement Agreement
fields.placeholder: Describe when and how payouts are distributed...

steps.label: Deploy
steps.description: Set pool economics and deploy on-chain

fields.name: maxPayout
fields.label: Max Payout (CZUSD)
fields.helperText: Maximum payout per policyholder on trigger

fields.name: depositAmount
fields.label: Underwriting Deposit (CZUSD)
fields.helperText: Must be >= maxPayout * minHolders to activate pool

fields.name: gasAck
fields.label: I have AVAX for gas fees

states.name: Sources Step
states.description: Step 1 — selecting data sources and consensus method

elementDescriptions.Source Cards: Grid of available sources (CoinGecko, CryptoCompare, Chainlink, OpenWeather, FlightAware) — click to select
elementDescriptions.Consensus Toggle: median / majority / byFields toggle — default median
elementDescriptions.Next Button: Disabled until at least 2 sources selected

elementDescriptions.Metric Input: Free text for the field path from source (e.g. 'price')
elementDescriptions.Test Source Button: Calls /api/test-source — shows live value from configured sources
elementDescriptions.Next Button: Disabled until all fields filled and test passes

states.name: Agreements Step
states.description: Step 3 — writing eligibility and settlement agreements

elementDescriptions.Verification Type: Select drives eligibility form shown to policyholders
elementDescriptions.Eligibility Textarea: Editable agreement text with Generate AI button
elementDescriptions.Settlement Textarea: Editable agreement text with Generate AI button
elementDescriptions.Generate Button: Calls /api/ai-chat with pool context — fills textarea with AI draft

states.name: AI Generating Agreement
states.description: POST /api/ai-chat in flight for agreement generation

elementDescriptions.Generate Button: Spinner, disabled while waiting for Claude Service response

states.name: Deploy Step
states.description: Step 4 — setting pool economics and deploying

elementDescriptions.Deposit Button: Opens DepositDialog — CZUSD.approve() + transfer before deploy
elementDescriptions.Deploy Button: Disabled until deposit confirmed and gasAck checked
Spinner, disabled — wallet signing in progress

states.name: Activating Pool
states.description: POST /api/activate-pool called after createPool() tx confirms

elementDescriptions.Status Message: Server wallet calling factory.activatePool() — transitioning FUNDING → ACTIVE

states.name: Pool Deployed
states.description: Pool is ACTIVE — user redirected to pool detail page

elementDescriptions.Success State: Green checkmark, pool address, link to /policies/[address]

appFlows.name: Select data sources and consensus
appFlows.trigger: User clicks source cards and selects consensus method

steps.description: User selects 2-3 source cards (CoinGecko, CryptoCompare, Chainlink, OpenWeather, FlightAware)
Consensus method toggle: median (default), majority, or byFields
Next button enabled when >= 2 sources selected

appFlows.outcome: sources[] and consensusMethod stored in wizard state

appFlows.name: Configure trigger condition
appFlows.trigger: User fills trigger fields and clicks Test Source

steps.description: User fills metric, comparison, threshold, duration, cadence
POST /api/test-source with source config — proxy to mock server, returns live metric value
Live value shown next to threshold for comparison — user confirms trigger makes sense

appFlows.outcome: Trigger config validated against live source data

appFlows.name: Generate and write agreements
appFlows.trigger: User clicks Generate AI button or writes agreements manually

steps.description: POST /api/ai-chat with pool context (metric, threshold, sources) — Claude Service generates eligibility agreement draft
POST /api/ai-chat for settlement agreement — describes payout conditions in plain language
Textarea populated with AI draft — user can edit before proceeding

appFlows.outcome: eligibilityAgreement and settlementAgreement text ready for on-chain hash

appFlows.name: Deploy pool on-chain
appFlows.trigger: User completes deposit and clicks Deploy

steps.description: SurelyFactory.createPool(name, description, ...triggerParams, ...economicParams, eligibilityHash, settlementHash) — deploys new InsurancePool
POST /api/activate-pool with { txHash } — server wallet calls factory.activatePool(poolAddress)
InsurancePool state transitions FUNDING → ACTIVE on factory.activatePool()
Router.push('/policies/[newPoolAddress]') — user sees their new pool detail page

appFlows.outcome: New InsurancePool deployed and ACTIVE on Avalanche Fuji

apiEndpoints.description: Server wallet activates a newly deployed pool. Reads pool address from txHash receipt, calls SurelyFactory.activatePool(poolAddress) to transition FUNDING → ACTIVE.

serverFlow.description: Validate txHash is valid 0x-prefixed hex string
publicClient.getTransactionReceipt(txHash) — extract poolAddress from PoolCreated event logs
Server wallet calls SurelyFactory.activatePool(poolAddress) — pool transitions FUNDING → ACTIVE

errorResponses.when: txHash not valid hex or tx not found

apiEndpoints.description: Proxy to mock server to test data source connectivity and preview live metric values before pool deployment.

request.fieldPath: string — JSON path to metric field

serverFlow.description: Validate sourceUrl is reachable HTTP URL, fieldPath is non-empty
Server fetches sourceUrl, extracts value at fieldPath via JSON path
Return { value, timestamp } — client displays as live preview

errorResponses.when: URL unreachable or field path returns null
Upstream API returned non-200 or timeout
